project_name: Red de Amor y Solidaridad - Entrepreneur Network

theme_and_archetype.description: Warm, trust-building, and community-driven interface. Teal represents stability, growth, and trust, while warm orange signifies energy, community, and action. Designed primarily for community networks and entrepreneur registration.

headings.style: Warm humanist serif, flowing script-leaning feel for large displays.

body.style: Clean grotesque sans, highly readable, friendly.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing philosophy (p-6, p-12, p-16, p-24). Create breathing room around community photos and profile details.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Subtle borders (border-border/40). No harsh dropshadows. Rely on crisp 1px borders for structure.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for buttons. Slightly rounded corners (rounded-2xl) for profile and service cards to maintain an organic, friendly feel.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Bento-style asymmetric grids for marketing sections. Standard responsive grids (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) for the Entrepreneur Directory.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E97A3A] hover:bg-[#D86B2F] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#1F4E47] text-[#1F4E47] hover:bg-[#1F4E47] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.pills_filters: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-[#1F4E47] rounded-full px-4 py-2 hover:border-[#E97A3A] hover:text-[#E97A3A]

hero.layout: Full-bleed background image with a teal overlay (bg-[#1F4E47]/60). Text centered or left-aligned with a max-width container.
hero.elements: Eyebrow 'TOGETHER, WE TRANSFORM.' (uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], white). H1 'Moving Hearts, Uniting Efforts, And Generating Real Impact.' (Serif, white). Primary orange CTA.

service_strip.elements: Orange circular icon backgrounds with white icons. Dark teal bold labels ('Organizations & Churches', 'Community Leaders', 'Entrepreneurs').

business_cards.layout: Cardless or subtle 1px border. Flex column.
business_cards.elements: Logo/Image top, Category Badge (teal text on light teal bg), Business Name (Serif), Location (Sans, small), short description, 'View profile' link (Orange text).

forms_and_dashboard.layout: Clean, distraction-free layouts. Sidebar for dashboard with teal active states.
forms_and_dashboard.elements: Multistep registration needs clear progress indicators (orange). Use Shadcn customized components (Inputs, Selects) with rounded-lg borders and focus:ring-[#1F4E47].

icons.usage: Use warm, friendly rounded icons. For the service strip, use lucide icons inside a circular orange background.

woven_heart_logo.description: Primary brand logo. Colorful woven heart with teal, warm orange, purple, and yellow strands on white.
woven_heart_logo.placement: Header navigation, Footer, Login screen, Dashboard sidebar top.

community_hero_bg.description: Diverse community of smiling people and children. Used with a 60% dark teal (#1F4E47) overlay.
community_hero_bg.placement: Main landing page hero section background.

entrepreneur_profile_1.description: Smiling woman holding a clay object in a workshop.
entrepreneur_profile_1.placement: Entrepreneur Directory dummy card image, or 'Why Join' section feature image.

community_gathering.placement: About us or 'Why Join the Network' visual background.

volunteers.description: Diverse group of volunteers taking a selfie, community service.
volunteers.placement: Call to action section for 'Organizations & Churches' or 'Community Leaders'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the exact color palette: deep teal (#1F4E47) and warm orange (#E97A3A). Do not invent generic SaaS blue or purple gradients.
Implement bilingual support structure early (EN/ES) and ensure the toggle is in the top utility bar.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
Use Shadcn UI for forms, tabs, and modals, but customize them by stripping out default borders and applying the rounded-2xl or rounded-full style where specified.
For the hero section, use pure HTML/Tailwind to properly layer the background image, the teal overlay (bg-[#1F4E47]/60), and the foreground text.
Use a fluid serif font for major headings (H1, H2) to evoke the 'moving hearts' and 'human' aspect of the community.
Build a sidebar layout for the Entrepreneur Dashboard. The registration flow should be a clear, multistep process with orange progress indicators.
